prompt:
Build app.py and pages/1_🏠_Home.py for the Rosetta project.

app.py responsibilities:
- Minimal entry point
- Initialize session state via session_manager.initialize_session()
- Redirect to Home page
- Set page config: title "Rosetta", icon "🌿", layout "wide"

pages/1_🏠_Home.py responsibilities:
- Hero section with title and one-line description
- Connection form: server input, database input, username input, password input (masked)
- Builds pyodbc connection string from inputs
- Connect button triggers db_inspector.get_database_metadata() then llm_generator.generate_tier1_content()
- Shows spinner during introspection with elapsed time
- On success: stores via session_manager, shows success message, lists table count
- On failure: shows error message, stays on page
- If already connected: shows current database name and Reconnect button

Import from src modules only. No logic in pages, only UI.
